description: First batch: leaves of the dependency graph. Pure file moves with case-style normalization (camelCase filenames -> kebab-case). Originals stay in place until full refactor verified.

Moves the persistence monolith and the graph persister into src/core/database/. Keeps persistence.js whole (not split into per-table query modules yet) so each step is independently revertible. After this batch lands, a follow-up will carve the class into a connection module + per-table query modules.
notes: persistence.js contains a dynamic lib-loader (path.join(__dirname, '..', 'lib') ...) that the AST rewriter cannot see — that path will be hand-patched after the move to keep the loader pointing at the right place.

description: Warmup batch: two small, self-contained backend modules with only external (built-in / npm) requires. Should require zero import rewrites.

Schema card generation suite: emitter, printer (TXT fallback), manifest generator (connection-state.json + ai-signal.toml). emitter and manifestGenerator both contain dynamic path-joined loads that the AST rewriter can't see — they'll be hand-patched.
PRD generation + template engine. Both files only require external modules (fs/path/os) — should be a clean batch with zero rewrites.
Analysis suite: gap analyzer, intent seeder, insight store. insightStore.js references databasePersister which moved in batch 002 — history-aware rewriter should catch it.

5 of 7 integr8 modules — the ones whose internal deps are all already moved (types) OR in this same batch (tomlSerializer for migrationExecutor). dataIngestion + integr8/index.js are deferred because dataIngestion still has 6 requires to sibling parser files in lib/commands/ that haven't moved yet — they'll migrate together in the indexing batch.
followUps: After tomlSerializer is moved, retarget src/features/schema-cards/manifest-generator.js to require('../integr8/toml-serializer') directly instead of using the LIB_DIR walk-up (that hand-patch was provisional from batch 004).

description: Parser ecosystem + remaining integr8 modules + graph commands. All deps either external, prior-batch (handled by history), or sibling within this batch. backgroundIndexer.js is intentionally NOT in this batch — it has pre-existing broken requires (sonicClient/multiPassAnalyzer, post-cleanup orphans) and needs its own decision before it can move cleanly.

indexer.js (the file indexing engine) + notificationBus.js (event bus). indexer.js carries the loadLibModule pattern again with 4 dynamic loads — all 4 target files have already moved, so the patch is to retarget each loader at its new home using direct static requires.

Finishes the backend/ directory. index.js (main entry), server.js (HTTP API), and verify-persistence-fixes.js (verification script). All static requires resolve through history. index.js has 2 inline dynamic astParser loads that need manual patching.

Move the 6 root-level frontend JS files into src/frontend/. All are browser-only modules (zero require() calls, reference window/document) — verified via syntax check only. st8.html still loads the originals from root — that's a separate (bigger) task: the st8.html peel-apart.

Move backgroundIndexer.js to src/features/indexing/. The file currently throws at module load with Cannot find module './sonicClient.js' — references three siblings that were stripped from lib/commands during an earlier cleanup (sonicClient.js, multiPassAnalyzer.js, precisionCapture.js, all originally from maestro-scaffolder-tool). The verify step is expected to report WARN — both old and new throw identically. The 5 other relative requires (databasePersister, dataIngestion, parserPersistence, insightStore, integr8/types) will rewrite cleanly via history. Sonic is https://github.com/valeriansaliou/sonic — backend search engine; the client lib is what's missing.
